## Component

- [ ] Specification (`spec/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (security, fund loss, consensus break)
- [ ] High (incorrect behavior, data corruption)
- [ ] Medium (degraded UX, workaround exists)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic, typo, minor inconvenience)

> **For security-critical bugs:** do NOT open a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) and email security@noethrion.com.
